meta.name: Auto Summary
meta.description: When publishing, if the summary is empty, generate one from the body or title.

enabled.title: Enable auto summary
enabled.description: When disabled, summary is not auto-filled on publish.

maxLength.title: Maximum length
maxLength.description: Max characters taken from the body (40–500).

suffix.title: Truncation suffix
suffix.description: Appended when content exceeds max length, e.g. …

fallbackToTitle.title: Use title when body is empty
fallbackToTitle.description: When stripped Markdown body is empty, use the article title as summary.
